appraisal_events.evidence: Elle était apparue… sombrant, glissant à l'abîme, se retenant désespérément aux coussins… les cheveux en désordre, l'œil égaré… incapable de plus faire face à l'assaut des images…
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents the grandmother as visibly stricken and already seized by illness, seen by passersby (and Legrandin) as collapsing. This description locally lowers her standing through a stark depiction of physical and existential debility.

status_effects.explanation: Within this passage, she is portrayed as overwhelmed by illness—disordered, unable to hold herself steady—which markedly diminishes her local position.
